case_title: JOSE LUIS FAJARDO VS. SERGIO M LOPEZ

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAJARDO, JOSE LUIS LARIOS AS TO DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SERGIO M AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SERGIO'S DRYWALL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAJARDO, JOSE LUIS LARIOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, SERGIO M AN INDIVIDUAL DBA SERGIO'S DRYWALL $4,284.10 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,464.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
